content:
Anthropic, on 4/16: We're increasing limits for all subscribers because Opus 4.7 uses more tokens. Enjoy!

Anthropic, on 4/21: No more Claude Code for some Pro subscribers.

Our subscription plans weren't built for this.

https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2046999435239133246
source: Anthropic / ClaudeDevs X posts (April 16 and April 21)

content:
Claude Code's /ultrareview feature is in research preview.

You get 3 free reviews before 5/5.

Free as in: here, try this thing we're definitely charging you for later.

https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2046999435239133246

Anthropic spent a month letting Claude Code feel worse, then shipped a postmortem explaining the three bugs that made paying users think the model got dumber.

The fix landed in v2.1.116+ and they reset subscriber limits, which is a very elegant way to say the product was doing involuntary chaos testing on customers.

https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2047371123185287223
